FirstLogin.description: Date and time of the user's first login to the app.

FirstLoginHuman.description: Human-readable representation of the first login date.

LastActivity.description: Date and time of the user's last activity in the app.

LastActivityHuman.description: Human-readable representation of the last activity date.

GoogleTokens.description: Number of Google push notification tokens associated with the app install.

AppleTokens.description: Number of Apple push notification tokens associated with the app install.

OrderCount.description: Number of orders placed by the user through this app install.

UserAgentAtSignup.description: User agent string at the time of signup.

UserAgentMostRecent.description: Most recent user agent string used by the user.
